query_normalized: predicting plant stress response from publicly available transcriptomic data biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same biological mechanism (transcriptomic response to water deficit) and variables (gene expression predicting stress status) in the same plant domain. It provides canonical evidence for the feasibility of using transcriptomic data to predict plant stress, which is the core relationship the user intends to study.
